title: myosotis palustris var. laxiflora
intro: Myosotis palustris var. laxiflora, also known as alpine forget-me-not, is a variety of the flowering plant Myosotis palustris. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of alpine forget-me-not include its ability to treat conditions such as kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and gout due to its diuretic properties, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Alpine forget-me-not can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
